name: Shopify-Order-Tracking-Guide-V1.docx
content:
How do I track my order from king.parts or ceking.com?

Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a shipping confirmation email containing a tracking number and a link to track your parcel. If you did not receive this email, check your spam folder or contact support@ceking.com with your order number.

Details

  • After placing an order, you will receive an order confirmation email immediately
  • When your order is dispatched, a second email is sent with the tracking number and carrier details
  • Click the tracking link in the email to see real-time delivery status
  • If you created an account on king.parts, you can also log in to view your order history and tracking status
  • Spare parts orders are typically dispatched within 3–5 business days
  • Machine orders have longer lead times — delivery dates are confirmed at time of order
  • UK deliveries: typically 1–3 business days after dispatch via courier
  • International deliveries: typically 5–21 business days depending on destination
  • If your tracking shows delivered but you have not received the parcel, contact both the carrier and support@ceking.com
  • For any order status query, always include your order number or the email address used at checkout
  • If you have not received a dispatch email within 5 business days of ordering, contact support@ceking.com

Useful link:

king.parts — C.E. King Spare Parts Store
